title: Fit test - 2nd screen UI
scenario: Fit Test second screen UI does not match Figma design spec when starting test from Device Settings on Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a supported device (Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20) is connected via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Device Settings → Fit Test.
6. Observe the second screen that appears after tapping "Start Test".
expected: The second screen UI matches the Figma design specification (layout, elements, text, icons, and spacing as defined in the design spec).
